For Funeral Homes
Partner With Us to Offer Families Something Lasting

Offer a meaningful takeaway keepsake without adding complexity to your process. We handle design, printing, and delivery — your staff simply passes them along to families.

  • Simple, streamlined ordering process
  • Fast turnaround — dependable when timing matters
  • Local and reliable — Michigan-based small business
  • Bulk pricing available for funeral home partners
  • Professional proofing — you approve before we print
  • Custom text, font, and layout for each family
Process

How It Works

Four simple steps from first contact to finished magnets in hand.

01

Send Photo & Details

Email or text a clear photo with the name, dates, and any message or text you'd like included.

02

Proof Created

We design a respectful layout with your chosen font and text, then send a digital proof to review.

03

Approval

Review and approve — or request adjustments. We don't print until everything looks right.

04

Printed & Delivered

Magnets are printed, finished, and delivered in time for the service.

What We Make

A Magnet for Every Moment

Pet Magnets

Your pet is family. A pet photo magnet captures their personality in a format you can display anywhere. Perfect as a gift for pet lovers — and a loving tribute after a loss.

Family Magnets

A cherished family photo in a durable format for everyday display. Keep it on the fridge, give one to grandparents, or order a set from different years. Family magnets make thoughtful gifts people actually keep.

Party Favors

A unique party favor guests will actually hold onto. Custom photo magnets work beautifully for birthdays, weddings, graduations, and reunions. Add a custom date or message to make it truly memorable.

Birthdays · Weddings · Graduations · Baby Showers · Reunions

Business Magnets

A compact promotional magnet that keeps your brand visible every day. Display your logo, name, and contact information in a format customers will put right on their fridge.

Local businesses · Real estate agents · Contractors · Service providers

About Treasured Moments Studio

Made with Care.
Built to Last.

A Michigan-based small business dedicated to creating quality keepsakes that matter.

Personalized keepsakes, one magnet at a time

Our Story

Quality, Purpose,
and Personal Touch

Treasured Moments Studio was founded with a simple idea: photos shouldn't just live on phones. They should be turned into something people can hold, display, and return to — something real.

We specialize in personalized 2"×3" photo magnets with a focus on memorial keepsakes for funeral homes and families. Every magnet is fully customizable — photo, text, font, and layout. We send a digital proof before printing so every detail is exactly right.

We also offer custom magnets for everyday occasions and photography sessions designed to produce images that become lasting keepsakes.

Local. Reliable. Invested in every single order.

What We Offer

Our Services

Memorial Magnets

Respectful, fully personalized keepsakes for funeral homes and families — custom photo, name, dates, text, and font.


Custom Magnets

Pets, families, party favors, businesses — any photo, any message, any occasion.


Photography Sessions

Natural, clean photography for families, seniors, pets, and sports — images made to become keepsakes.
